title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 5.1c
paragraphs: Look! Up in the sky! It’s a bird! It’s a plane! It’s Maokai’s sapling aimed straight at you! Hope you weren’t sitting in a bush or anything. Let’s find somewhere comfy to go over the rest of this patch note. We have some fun new game modes to try out, a brand new Wild Pass to grind, and our regularly scheduled balance changes. Welcome to Patch 5.1c!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

Maokai is a rageful, towering treant who fights the unnatural horrors of the Shadow Isles. He was twisted into a force of vengeance after a magical cataclysm destroyed his home, surviving undeath only through the Waters of Life infused within his heartwood. Once a peaceful nature spirit, Maokai now furiously battles to banish the scourge of unlife from the Shadow Isles and restore his home to its former beauty.
Maokai will be released on June 14 at 00:01 UTC.
We got a new NPC and some new augments! Come try it out!
Arena: Ruinous Might will be available on June 6
You’re Draven and they’re Draven and everyone is Draven!
Urf x League of Draven will be available on June 17
New champion alert! Complete missions to earn goodies!
The Maokai’s Trivia event begins June 14 at 00:01 UTC
Try out our line up of different games modes such as PVP, ARAM, Ranked and special game modes such as URF and One For All and earn goodies!
The Now Showing: Rotating Modes event begins June 17 at 00:01 UTC
Login and complete Wild Pass missions to earn prizes!
The Wild Pass Sprint event begins June 21 at 00:01 UTC
Fury of the Dragonborn
BLADE OF THE RUINED KING
Grandmaster's Might
We’re making sure Rod of Ages is providing more stats to champs in the late game so that it remains an attractive pickup for players.
With recent items granting bonus max Health, Overgrowth is making some champions too tanky to handle. We’re nerfing it slightly.
